title: The Gray Man
location: Pawleys Island / Folly Beach, South Carolina
summary: A gray figure appears before a hurricane and warns Tommy to leave. The story connects family history, warning spirits, and coastal folklore.

title: Seventh Floor Portal
location: Basin Park Hotel, Eureka Springs, Arkansas
summary: A hotel worker experiences a bar coming alive with unseen presences, footsteps, laughter, and a hostile entity.

title: The Mirror Guest
summary: A guest requests every mirror be covered before sundown. The host later hears layered screams, footsteps, and warnings that something used the mirrors to learn the house.

title: Mr. Sage and the Goatman
summary: A casino regular warns a blackjack dealer not to turn around if he hears hooves in the desert. The story connects 333, thin lines, and alternate versions of the self.

title: National Park Horned Figure
summary: A ranger binder allegedly tracks recurring sightings of a horned humanoid creature, missing workers, and cycles of returns.

title: Thanks, I Hate This
summary: A strange-news segment where headlines that sound fake but are presented as real become rabbit holes for the community.
